name: Aurora AI (Full Ownership)
description: Full IP rights for Aurora AI: Forensic Vehicle Intelligence. As seen on IndieMaker & SideProjector. High-fidelity generative engine ready for enterprise integration. View live demo via secure GCP instance.

name: Surfshark VPN
description: The recommended backbone for Fair Discovery security nodes. 256-bit AES encryption with multi-hop capability. Essential for ethical VPN architecture and secure forensic reconnaissance.

name: Hono Guardian Node
description: Edge-native account protection. A Hono-based security proxy with optional AI threat-analysis to guard high-value social media assets.

name: Ad-Guard Enterprise
description: Industrial-grade bot detection. Verify human engagement across YouTube, TikTok, and Google Ads at the source code level.

name: Stealth Access Audit
description: Forensic access audit node. Test content-gate vulnerabilities via header emulation and crawler-profile injection.

name: OSINT Swiss Knife
description: Automated digital footprinting suite. Modular Python nodes for rapid subject reconnaissance and data correlation.

name: AI Content Sentinel
description: Forensic-grade content auditor. Scan assets for AI-signature patterns and burstiness markers to ensure search engine compliance.

name: AIVPN Concept Node
description: Foundational concept code for an ethical, AI-driven VPN architecture. Includes the 'Content Scout' logic, server rotation, and UI blueprint.
